name: wifi-inspect
description: WiFi Security Scanner - Detect cameras and suspicious devices on hotel/Airbnb networks

scripts.dev: bun run --cwd mobile dev & bun run --cwd server dev
scripts.build: bun run build --cwd shared && bun run build --cwd mobile && bun run build --cwd server
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck --cwd shared && bun run typecheck --cwd mobile && bun run typecheck --cwd server
